metadata.description: Native Linux control via MCP — 32 typed allow-listed tools across filesystem, process, clipboard, screenshots, mouse/keyboard, notifications, dialogs, and windows. Detects X11/Wayland at runtime. Companion to mac-mcp.

plugins.name: linux-mcp
plugins.description: Native Linux control: 32 typed tools, X11+Wayland runtime detection, allow-listed filesystem and process exec.
